featureCards.sectionTitle: The wedding platform your guests will love.
featureCards.sectionSubtitle: Every tool you need, beautifully designed and simple to use.

guestList.title: Guest List Management
guestList.desc: Easily manage your entire guest list, track RSVPs, and organise relationships. Import guests, send invitations, and keep everything perfectly organised.

tables.title: Seating Made Simple
tables.desc: Create tables and assign guests with ease using our visual drag-and-drop system. See capacity at a glance and make last-minute changes effortlessly.

qr.title: Instant Guest Seating
qr.desc: Guests scan a QR code to instantly find their table — no confusion, no delays. A modern, tech-forward touch your guests will love.

runningSheet.title: Plan Every Moment
runningSheet.desc: Create a full schedule for your wedding day and share with vendors. Keep everyone on the same page from ceremony to last dance.

invitations.title: Invitations & RSVPs
invitations.desc: Send beautiful digital invitations and track responses in real time. Customise designs, add QR codes, and manage RSVPs all in one place.

myEvents.title: Your Events, Your Way
myEvents.desc: Create and manage multiple events from a single dashboard. Track countdowns, set up venues, and keep every detail organised beautifully.

placeCards.title: Elegant Name Place Cards
placeCards.desc: Design stunning printed name cards with custom fonts, colours, and backgrounds. Export in high-resolution 300 DPI for professional printing.

tableCharts.title: Individual Table Charts
tableCharts.desc: Generate beautiful per-table seating charts your guests can see at a glance. Perfect for printing and displaying at each table.

dietary.title: Dietary Requirements Made Easy
dietary.desc: Track every guest's dietary needs and generate kitchen-ready charts. Ensure no guest is overlooked with detailed allergen and preference tracking.

seatingChart.title: Full Seating Chart
seatingChart.desc: Create a complete, print-ready seating chart showing every guest and table. Export to PDF with custom styling and your event branding.

kiosk.title: Kiosk Live View
kiosk.desc: Set up self-service check-in kiosks at your venue entrance. Guests search their name and instantly see their table assignment on screen.

djmc.title: DJ & MC Questionnaire
djmc.desc: Share your music preferences, pronunciation guides, and event timeline directly with your DJ or MC. Keep everyone aligned for the perfect celebration.

floorPlan.title: Venue Floor Plan
floorPlan.desc: Visualise your entire venue layout with an interactive floor plan. Position tables, map the ceremony space, and plan every area of your event.

extraGrid.title: Everything you need for your perfect day

pricing.title: Simple, Transparent Pricing
pricing.subtitle: Start free. Upgrade when you're ready.
pricing.trialNote: All plans include a 7-day free trial (up to 20 guests). No risk. Upgrade anytime.
pricing.reassurance: One simple plan. Full access. Choose by guest size only.
pricing.saveLine: Save over $1,000 vs buying tools separately

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know before getting started.

items.a: No. Guests scan a QR code or click a link — no login, app, or download required.

items.q: Can I send RSVP invites by email or SMS?
items.a: Yes! Send beautiful digital invitations and track RSVPs in real time.

items.q: Can I manage seating charts and guest lists in one place?
items.a: Absolutely. Everything from guest management to seating charts is built into one platform.

items.q: Is Wedding Waitress suitable for venues and planners too?
items.a: Yes. Our Vendor Pro plan is built for venues, planners, DJs, and event professionals.

items.q: What happens after the 7-day free trial?
items.a: You can upgrade anytime. If you don't, your data stays safe and you can return later.
We offer a full refund within 14 days of purchase if you haven't exceeded the free trial limits.
